case_title: RAMONA GRAHAM VS. TOMRA PACIFIC, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-12-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-31-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-31-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAHAM, RAMONA SERVED SEP-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOMRA PACIFIC, INC.

RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAHAM, RAMONA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-10-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMRA PACIFIC, INC.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM BENJAMIN SMITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-21-2014 THROUGH MAY-22-2014.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMRA PACIFIC, INC.
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT TOMRA PACIFIC, INC.
